findings: The photographic close-up record produced one plausible promoted person box.
The two-person illustrated mange.v2 record produced only one broad promoted box, so multi-person ownership is incomplete.
The explicit two-person illustrated mange.v3 record returned no person.
The multi-panel illustrated doujin record returned no person.
visual_audit.systemic_result: YOLO11M alone is insufficient for adult illustration and multi-panel domains; no threshold was lowered and no ownership was inferred.

remaining: Run a governed independent detector family, preserve domain-specific misses as abstentions, and require two-family spatial consensus before person ownership.
